use tree_sitter::{Parser, Node};

fn find_nodes_at_ranges(root: Node, source: &str, points: &[(usize, usize)]) {
    for &(row, col) in points {
        let node = root.descendant_for_point_range(
            tree_sitter::Point { row, column: col },
            tree_sitter::Point { row, column: col + 1 },
        );
        if let Some(node) = node {
            let text = &source[node.start_byte()..node.end_byte()];
            println!("node: {}", text);
        }
    }
}

fn walk_and_query(root: Node, source: &str) {
    let mut cursor = root.walk();
    for child in root.named_children(&mut cursor) {
        let start = child.start_position();
        let node = root.descendant_for_point_range(start, child.end_position());
        if let Some(node) = node {
            let text = &source[node.start_byte()..node.end_position().column];
            process_node(node, source);
        }
    }
}

fn process_node(_node: Node, _source: &str) {}
